title: rubus galbinifrons
intro: Rubus galbinifrons, also known as the Yellow Raspberry or Yellow Bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to eastern Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus galbinifrons include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Rubus galbinifrons can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often consumed fresh or dried to utilize its medicinal properties.
